itinerary.title: Pink City Jaipur Short Break
itinerary.tagline: Pink City Jaipur Short Break • 02 Nights / 03 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to the majestic realm of royalty, heritage, and timeless architecture. Handcrafted meticulously by travel experts at TRAGUIN, this signature Jaipur Honeymoon Package and Rajasthan Family Tour is beautifully designed to immerse your loved ones into a grand, seamless, and aristocratic escape. Experience the captivating spirit of Rajasthan with ultra-premium stays, grand hospitality, and exquisite storytelling.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Vehicle Allocated: Dedicated Luxury AC Sedan / SUV (Chauffeur-Driven)
Meal Plan: Continental Luxury Buffet Breakfast & Festive Royal Dinners
Route Details: Jaipur Arrival → Heritage Forts exploration → Local Cultural Hubs → Departure

TRAGUIN Curated Experience Note: This premium itinerary introduces families to iconic attractions without the rush, emphasizing breathtaking landscapes, handpicked hotels, and unique immersive experiences.

WHY CHOOSE A LUXURY RAJASTHAN HOLIDAY?
Rajasthan is an enchanting land where history echoes through majestic sandstone palaces, vibrant bazaars, and beautiful heritage monuments. For those looking for the ultimate Premium Rajasthan Experience or the Best Time to Visit Rajasthan, Jaipur stands as an irreplaceable crown jewel.
During your Jaipur Sightseeing journey, you will encounter the Top Tourist Places in Rajasthan including the iconic Amber Fort, the floating Jal Mahal, and the honeycomb facade of Hawa Mahal. Our signature TRAGUIN Rajasthan Packages guarantee handpicked hotels, priority entries, luxury transportation, and unforgettable memories for your family.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-011 | Pink City Jaipur Short Break | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 02 Nights / 03 Days Rajasthan package (RJ-011 / TRAGUIN-RJ-011): Hawa Mahal, Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Chokhi Dhani, and 4-tier handpicked accommodation in Jaipur.

highlights.text: Hawa Mahal, Birla Mandir, Chokhi Dhani Village, Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar
Johari Bazaar and Bapu Bazaar shopping excursion
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private curated walk within the City Palace compound
Curated by Experts: Premium transportation and hassle-free transit routes
Exclusive Recommendations: Handpicked boutique jewelers and traditional block-printing houses

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur where your premium chauffeured luxury vehicle and TRAGUIN representative welcome you warmly. Transfer smoothly to your magnificent handpicked heritage hotel. After check-in and leisure time, begin your Jaipur Sightseeing at the legendary Hawa Mahal (Palace of Winds), capturing its spectacular honeycomb architecture. Later, visit the pristine Birla Mandir, made of pure white marble, before heading to Chokhi Dhani for an immersive cultural evening featuring traditional folk music, puppet shows, and a spectacular Rajasthani royal feast.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Hawa Mahal (Photo Stop), Birla Mandir, Chokhi Dhani Village.
Evening Experience: Live folk dances, camel rides, and authentic cultural culinary arts.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Luxury Palace Hotel, Jaipur.
Meals Included: Welcome Amenities & Festive Dinner.

days.title: Jaipur Heritage Exploration
days.description: Enjoy a premium buffet breakfast before starting a grand day out. Ascend the majestic hill of Amber Fort like royalty. Wander through the breathtaking Sheesh Mahal (Mirror Palace), where a single candle illuminates the entire hall. Next, stop for stunning photography at the Jal Mahal, floating gracefully in the center of Man Sagar Lake. Proceed to the opulent City Palace, still home to the royal family, and marvel at the giant astronomical instruments at the UNESCO World Heritage listed Jantar Mantar.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal Viewpoint, City Palace, Jantar Mantar.
Photography Points: Mirror reflection shots inside Amber Fort and sunset views at Jal Mahal.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Luxury Palace Hotel, Jaipur.
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Luxury Dinner.

days.title: Vibrant Bazaars & Departure
days.description: Savor a luxurious morning breakfast at your hotel. Spend your morning exploring the historic Johari Bazaar and Bapu Bazaar, famous for traditional block-print textiles, blue pottery, royal mojris, and fine kundan jewelry. In the afternoon, enjoy an authentic local lunch, visiting highly recommended artisan cafes. Your private chauffeur will then transfer you comfortably to the Jaipur Airport or Railway Station, bringing your premium TRAGUIN experience to a perfect close.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Local Heritage Bazaars, Shopping Excursion.
